Oxen.name: Oxen
Oxen.description: A sturdy animal used for pulling the wagon.
Oxen.effect: Used for pulling the wagon, increases travel speed.

Food.name: Food
Food.description: Basic rations to sustain your family.
Food.effect: Each lb of food supports 1 person for 1 day.

Ammunition.name: Ammunition
Ammunition.effect: Each bullet supports a hunting action or defense.

Clothes.name: Clothes
Clothes.description: Basic clothing to protect against the elements.
Clothes.effect: Protects from the cold, impacts morale.

Gold.name: Gold
Gold.description: Gold coins, used for trade and purchases.
Gold.effect: Can be used for trading and purchasing supplies.

Traps.name: Traps
Traps.description: Used for catching animals for food or trade.
Traps.effect: Each trap can catch one animal per day.

Tools.name: Tools
Tools.description: Basic tools used for maintenance and repair.
Tools.effect: Used for repairs and other maintenance tasks.

Wood.name: Wood
Wood.effect: Can be used for fuel or building repairs.

WagonRepairKit.name: Wagon Repair Kit
WagonRepairKit.effect: Used to repair the wagon, restoring durability.
